creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #4)

By "that" in "That is indeed true", do you refer to the first sentence in my previous comment? ("I was coming here to suggest textproc/vale for the styleguide side of igor too.")

Regardless, I seldom if ever look at software source code these days. There's a reason my software focus in the past 6+ years has been documentation and support, not development. So I'll take your word for it that Igor does try to explain, no matter how (in)accurate its explanations are.
